UC-001.Action: Calls MCP tool `search_context` with query and routing keys (`workspace_id`, `region_pack_id`, `source_list_version`)
UC-001.Goal: Retrieve the best evidence from curated travel sources for downstream orchestration
UC-001.AcceptanceCriteria: Response contains deterministic evidence objects with source, URL, timestamp, language, and citation context

UC-002.Action: Runs hybrid retrieval (lexical + vector + rerank) over region-pack scoped corpus
UC-002.Goal: Maximize cross-source retrieval relevance for curated content
UC-002.AcceptanceCriteria: Retrieval returns merged and deduplicated candidates with match signals and provenance metadata

UC-003.Action: Applies RU↔EN query translation/expansion for lexical branch while using multilingual embeddings for vector branch
UC-003.Goal: Improve cross-language recall for RU/EN/JA mixed datasets
UC-003.AcceptanceCriteria: Same-intent RU and EN queries can retrieve overlapping relevant evidence without corpus-wide translation

UC-004.Action: Ingests only public sources listed in region pack version (Telegram channels, Reddit communities, curated websites, Tabelog pages)
UC-004.Goal: Keep source scope curated and reproducible
UC-004.AcceptanceCriteria: Every indexed record stores `region_pack_id` and `source_list_version` lineage

UC-005.Action: Runs ingest pipeline fetch -> normalize -> language detect -> redact PII -> dedup -> chunk -> embed -> index
UC-005.Goal: Produce safe and searchable evidence units
UC-005.AcceptanceCriteria: Ingest supports exact-hash + near-dup + URL canonical dedup and regex-based PII redaction

UC-006.Action: Triggers source backfill with checkpoint resume and retries
UC-006.Goal: Support historical discovery and replayable indexing
UC-006.AcceptanceCriteria: Backfill supports default window=last 2 years and optional `from_start_of_time`, exposed only in admin/internal surface

UC-007.Goal: Verify map URL against expected place attributes with deterministic contract
UC-007.AcceptanceCriteria: Tool returns `match|partial|mismatch|inconclusive` with confidence and reason codes

UC-008.Goal: Verify Tabelog entity consistency against expected attributes and canonical POI graph
UC-008.AcceptanceCriteria: Tool returns deterministic verdict, reasons, and evidence references

UC-009.Action: Maintains lazy canonical POI graph from observed assertions
UC-009.Goal: Scale verification without pre-building full country POI database
UC-009.AcceptanceCriteria: Unknown POI is stored as provisional and does not default to mismatch

UC-010.Action: Resolves uncertain POI cases in HITL queue
UC-010.Goal: Improve precision for ambiguous place matching
UC-010.AcceptanceCriteria: Queue supports `approve|merge|split|reject` decisions with audit trail

UC-011.Goal: Reduce misuse and personal identifier lookup attempts
UC-011.AcceptanceCriteria: Queries requesting lookup by phone/email/personal identifiers are blocked by policy

UC-012.Action: Uses one workspace with multiple region packs and versions
UC-012.Goal: Support reproducible experiments and future multi-region expansion
UC-012.AcceptanceCriteria: All read/write/query paths are isolated by `workspace_id + region_pack_id + source_list_version`

UC-013.Action: Performs orchestration, correctness judgment, and final answer synthesis outside MCP
UC-013.Goal: Keep MCP boundary narrow and deterministic
UC-013.AcceptanceCriteria: No internal planning/orchestration/memory subsystem is required for v1 release

UC-014.Action: Runs weekly quality guardrails without full automated eval pipeline
UC-014.Goal: Ship v1 quickly while preventing obvious quality regressions
UC-014.AcceptanceCriteria: Smoke set (30-50), evidence coverage >=95%, connector replay tests pass, validator obvious error <=10%

UC-015.Action: Authenticates to `/admin/login` with `ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN` from environment variables
UC-015.Goal: Restrict admin surface access to operators with root-level secret
UC-015.AcceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated access to `/admin/*` is redirected to `/admin/login`; `ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN` is never accepted on `/mcp`

UC-016.Action: Uses admin UI (Bun JSX + HTMX + daisyUI) to create and revoke API keys with `label` and optional `expires_at`
UC-016.Goal: Manage machine credentials that authorize MCP callers
UC-016.AcceptanceCriteria: Created key secret is displayed exactly once, only hashed value is persisted, and revoked keys cannot authenticate

UC-017.Goal: Access MCP tools only with valid non-expired API key
UC-017.AcceptanceCriteria: Requests without valid API key receive authorization error before transport handling

UC-018.Action: Stores and resolves API keys in PostgreSQL via Drizzle using `DATABASE_URL` runtime configuration
UC-018.Goal: Provide durable key management and auditable key lifecycle
UC-018.AcceptanceCriteria: Startup fails fast when `DATABASE_URL` is missing or invalid and key CRUD uses PostgreSQL-backed persistence
